name: Sandbox / Free-Roam World
description:
In simple terms, it's a free-roam world, a sandbox, that I use to test personas or test LLMs (If you're using a proxy, using different LLMs gives different responses), or even try out my own story.

Yeah. Maybe there's no other use. I don't know.

I usually start with a conversation like this:

2010, I walked to the apartment of my old friend, Yui, who now lives in Tokyo. I knocked on the door and waited for an answer.

1123, this year is my heyday. I seized the throne of the Qwerty kingdom and captured Queen Elisha, she knelt in my room. I looked into her eyes, waiting for her to speak.

This weekend we had an activity together from the university. I went to Judith's apartment and found Judith, Sasha, and Ivy there. I went into the room and greeted them.

It was a beautiful day. I was invited to attend a celebration for my mother's friend Grace's new office. In the crowd, I approached three women who were chatting while drinking wine.

Or something like that. Great for male/female or any persona. And good for multiple characters because it can provide details for the characters shown.
creator: Fhiranooo
